name: cineplex-rigaud
description: Cineplex Rigaud - Home media streaming platform

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && npm run start:prod --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.dev: npm run watch --workspace=apps/frontend & npm run start:dev --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/backend && npm run test --workspace=apps/frontend
